text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright is being interviewed for a magazine
today.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You look fantastic in your signature racewear.
Were you particular about any aspects of the
design?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Aspects of the design? Well... I would have to say
this skirt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The seamstress crafted it precisely the way I
wanted, and I'm ever so grateful. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Mejiro Bright beam as she discusses her
signature racewear reminds me of the day it
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Look, everyone. I went with this design. May I ask
for your thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, picture perfect!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it suits you nicely, Bright. The big puffy
sleeves, the high-waisted skirt, all of it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's lively and cute. I know I wouldn't be able to
pull a design like that off myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't say that, Dober. Of course you would.
As would Ryan as well. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If, for instance, you were to don something like
this, Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps a crimson dress adorned with frills and
lace? And with a nice headdress for good
measure. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Dah! H-hey! Stop! As if something so flashy would
look good on me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Although, I must admit that it's cute. And if you insist, Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And how about this ensemble for you, Ryan? To
start with...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
An ample, frilly blouse coupled with a pinafore
dress would surely suit you very nicely indeed!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa, hold on! That kind of outfit's not
really my thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But, um... It's not like I don't care, yeah? Uhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway! That signature racewear's great. It
really brings out your best side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That skirt's especially striking. Maybe it's all that
bright teal-green?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee! Yes, I suppose it does stand out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, though, you were the inspiration
behind this skirt, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...I was?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, when I was still quite young, I had difficulty
keeping up with everyone and came to be
considered an underachiever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And yet, you took my hand and ran alongside me,
Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I was by no means a fast runner at the time, but
you ran and ran with me, all around the training
center.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The excitement that welled up within me back
then is a cornerstone of who I am today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The teal-green of my skirt is the same as that of
the lush scenery that surrounded us at the training
center that day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The scenery of my memory with you, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have trained hard since then, both by honing my
skills with Dober and under my trainer's
tutelage...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And now here I am, honoring the Mejiro family
tradition by dressing in green and white signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Ryan, please allow me to use this opportunity
to express my gratitude for all you've done for
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So you put all that thought into it... Hehe, maybe
that's why your skirt struck a chord with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: There's this skirt, and one more thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A sign of our bond—passed down from you to me
and Dober, which we now share in our legs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Clad in my very esteem for you, Ryan, I shall
become the light of the Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! I can't wait to see you barrel
down the track in that racewear!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I mean to win as well, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
One final question for you, Mejiro Bright. Would
you mind sharing a little about the inspiration
behind your racewear design?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Inspiration, you ask? Well... Um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Mejiro Bright struggle to answer, I find
myself unable to just sit back and watch her
squirm.
choice_data_list:
I apologize, but we need to start today's
training session.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. In that case, we'll call it there. Thank
you for your time and your answers. I have a good
feeling about this article.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer. About what just transpired at
the interview...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why do you think I found myself tongue-tied with
that last question?
choice_data_list:
Because you didn't think now was the time to
share that story.
Because that memory is precious to you.
Because that memory is precious to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why do you think I found myself tongue-tied with
that last question?
choice_data_list:
Because you didn't think now was the time to
share that story.
Because that memory is precious to you.
Because that memory is precious to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer. How wonderful it is that we think along
the same lines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I believe that my memories are best kept out of
the public eye until I'm ready to proudly bear the
Mejiro mantle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And we've yet to reach that point in our journey.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I wish for you to remain at my side until
that glorious day arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reaffirming our vision for the future, Mejiro
Bright and I vow once again to make it a reality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! So you were able to accurately intuit how I
felt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah... But today's not the first time, is it? You've
always understood my feelings and offered me
support.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let us join hands and continue down this path at
our own pace.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I once again ask for your wisdom and
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like my bond with Mejiro Bright has grown
even stronger.
